title: agrostis stolonifera subsp. stolonizans
intro: Agrostis stolonifera subsp. stolonizans, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis stolonifera subsp. stolonizans include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Agrostis stolonifera subsp. stolonizans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
